Author: DriftlessDigits
Name: Scrooge
Punchline: A gil saved is a gil earned.
Description: "You might say that everythin's for sale here in Ul'dah — as long as you've got the gil." — Momodi Modi
Changelog: Added Gil Tracking — captures retainer sales, gil balances, and listing duration during pinch runs. Gil Dashboard (/giltrack) with portfolio summary, recent sales, category breakdown, and slow movers.
